tasks.subject: Task 1: box_lava_gap chunk
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A long, shallow lava pit with a solid floor; a box shoved in rests on the floor as a mid-pit stepping stone. In the Infinite Run sampler.

**Files:** Create src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_lava_gap.py; Modify src/blueball/levels/chunks/__init__.py; Test tests/test_chunks.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** registered + sampler_include True + difficulty 3; build returns total width and adds 5 segments + 1 Lava sensor + 1 PushableBox; resting box top above lava surface; box rests on pit floor not destroyed; build accepts base_y.

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_chunks.py -k box_lava_gap -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_lava_gap.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/__init__.py", "tests/test_chunks.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_chunks.py -k box_lava_gap -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registered, sampler_include True, difficulty 3", "5 segs + Lava sensor + PushableBox; width", "box top above lava surface", "box rests on floor not destroyed", "base_y accepted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire box_lava_gap into maze.json + streaming-cull test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Place a box_lava_gap in maze.json and prove its chunk-spawned Lava + PushableBox cull correctly under Infinite Run streaming.

**Files:** Modify src/blueball/levels/maze.json; Test tests/test_play_scene.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** maze.json has one box_lava_gap and loads; lava+box tracked in _built_chunks record; after culling, entities removed from world.entities and bodies from space.

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_play_scene.py -k box_lava_gap -v ; .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_loader.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/maze.json", "tests/test_play_scene.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_play_scene.py -k box_lava_gap -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["maze has box_lava_gap and loads", "lava+box tracked", "entities+bodies culled"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: box_spring_trampoline chunk
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A spring + box on the ground + a high exit ledge unreachable without bouncing off the box. Hand-authored only (sampler_include False).

**Files:** Create src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_spring_trampoline.py; Modify __init__.py; Test tests/test_chunks.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** registered + sampler_include False + difficulty 4; build adds ground + exit ledge + Spring + PushableBox; width = width_tiles*TILE; base_y; box on spring gains vy<=-impulse.

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_chunks.py -k box_spring_trampoline -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_spring_trampoline.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/__init__.py", "tests/test_chunks.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_chunks.py -k box_spring_trampoline -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registered, sampler_include False, difficulty 4", "ground+exit+Spring+box; width; base_y", "box launched by spring"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: box_spring_relay chunk
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Two springs (ground + raised platform) + guide walls; the box relays from spring 1 up to spring 2 to reach a higher exit. Hand-authored only.

**Files:** Create src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_spring_relay.py; Modify __init__.py; Test tests/test_chunks.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** registered + sampler_include False + difficulty 5; build adds 3 horizontal segs + 2 guide-wall verticals + two Springs + one PushableBox; width; base_y; spring2 higher than spring1.

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_chunks.py -k box_spring_relay -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_spring_relay.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/__init__.py", "tests/test_chunks.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_chunks.py -k box_spring_relay -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["registered, sampler_include False, difficulty 5", "2 Springs + box + 5 segs (2 verticals); width; base_y", "spring2 higher than spring1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire spring puzzles into vertical_climb.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add box_spring_trampoline and box_spring_relay chunk entries to vertical_climb.json.

**Files:** Modify src/blueball/levels/vertical_climb.json; Test tests/test_loader.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:** chunks include one trampoline + one relay; level loads via load_level without raising.

**Verify:** .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_loader.py -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/vertical_climb.json", "tests/test_loader.py"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_loader.py -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chunks include trampoline + relay", "vertical_climb loads"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Playtest tuning pass (solvability + feel)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the levels via /run and tune each chunk's constants so all three puzzles are reliably solvable and feel fair.

**Files (tuning only):** box_lava_gap.py, box_spring_trampoline.py, box_spring_relay.py, maze.json, vertical_climb.json.

**Acceptance Criteria:** lava gap solvable via box and not single-jumpable, lava fatal; trampoline exit reachable only via bounce; relay solvable OR simplified+noted; full suite green.

**Verify:** Manual /run on maze.json + vertical_climb.json; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_lava_gap.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_spring_trampoline.py", "src/blueball/levels/chunks/box_spring_relay.py", "src/blueball/levels/maze.json", "src/blueball/levels/vertical_climb.json"], "verifyCommand": ".venv/bin/python -m pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lava gap solvable, not single-jumpable, lava fatal", "trampoline exit only via bounce", "relay solvable or simplified+noted", "full suite green"]}
```
